description_long: This is a modern urban bench featuring a combination of wood and metal materials. The seat and backrest are constructed from horizontal wooden slats, providing a natural and warm appearance, while the supporting frame and armrests are made of sturdy black metal. The bench is mounted on a rectangular concrete or stone platform, suggesting stability and durability for outdoor use. One side of the bench has a full armrest, while the other side is partially open, with a vertical metal support and a wooden accent. The design is minimalist yet functional, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic. The bench is suitable for public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas.
description: A modern bench with wooden slats and a black metal frame, mounted on a rectangular platform. It features a backrest, one full armrest, and a minimalist design for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, the wooden slats, and the backrest with one armrest on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden slats and the metal armrest structure.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the arrangement of the wooden slats and the open section on one end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the end of the bench without a full armrest and the clean, straight lines of the design.
